creator: calvin@insync.net
text:
Compaq Proliant 1600, dual PIII 500. After adding SMP support to the kernel machine locks up during boot. 

Changing APIC ID for IO APIC #0 from 0 to 8 on chip
Programming 35 pins in IOAPIC #0
IOAPIC #0 intpin 2 -> irq 0


Stops at "IOAPIC #0 intpin 2 -> irq 0"

How-To-Repeat: Compile SMP support into the generic kernel.

options         SMP                     # Symmetric MultiProcessor Kernel
options         APIC_IO                 # Symmetric (APIC) I/O
